name: Backyard Market in Black Forest - Holiday

Products.value: Over 45 local food and artisan vendors selling holiday gifts; food trucks, Campfire Coffee, WisCo Cheese fried curds, s'mores, and knife sharpening services

notes: On-file website https://thebackyardmarkets.com is live and is the correct operator (Backyard Market Inc.); the specific Holiday Market event page is https://www.thebackyardmarkets.com/upcoming-events/black-forest-holiday-market, held at Edith Wolford Elementary School, 13710 Black Forest Road (matches on-file address exactly, so no address change made). This is a single-day annual event in December (most recently observed Sat Dec 14 10am-3pm); exact date shifts year to year so only the month is given. SNAP/EBT, email, ADA accessibility, and certified-organic status were not clearly stated for this specific holiday event and were omitted. Operator also uses Instagram/Facebook handle @backyardfarmshop for the general farm shop brand; @backyardmarketinbf / facebook.com/BackyardMarketinBF (matching on-file facebook) is the handle tied specifically to this Black Forest market location.
